entities.name: DIAPAUSE
entities.description: Endocrine controlled arrested metabolic activity to delay development or reproduction under unfavorable conditions

entities.name: UNFAVORABLE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions that trigger the state of diapause

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process by which an organism becomes better suited to its environment through mechanisms like diapause

entities.name: INSECTS
entities.description: The general class of invertebrates in which diapause regulation is studied

entities.name: CHILO PARTELLUS
entities.description: The spotted stem borer insect used as the subject of the genetic study

entities.name: DIALLEL CROSS
entities.description: A genetic crossing scheme involving all possible combinations of parental populations including reciprocals

entities.name: HIBERNATING POPULATION
entities.description: A parental population of Chilo partellus characterized by hibernation

entities.name: AESTIVATING POPULATION
entities.description: A parental population of Chilo partellus characterized by aestivation

entities.name: POST-HIBERNATING POPULATION
entities.description: A parental population of Chilo partellus that has emerged from hibernation

entities.name: POST-AESTIVATING POPULATION
entities.description: A parental population of Chilo partellus that has emerged from aestivation

entities.name: NONDIAPAUSE POPULATION
entities.description: A parental population of Chilo partellus that does not exhibit diapause

entities.name: FECUNDITY
entities.description: The reproductive capacity of the insect

entities.name: EGG HATCHING
entities.description: The success rate of embryos emerging from eggs

entities.name: LARVAL SURVIVAL
entities.description: The rate of survival of larvae during development

entities.name: DIAPAUSE INDUCTION
entities.description: The process and incidence of entering the diapause state

entities.name: DIAPAUSE TERMINATION
entities.description: The process and rate of exiting the diapause state

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of adults emerging from the pupal stage

entities.name: GENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The overall process of studying the inheritance and variation of traits

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to evaluate the performance of specific parental combinations

entities.name: DEGREE OF DOMINANCE ESTIMATES
entities.description: A method used to determine the relative influence of dominant and recessive alleles

entities.name: OVERDOMINANCE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects where the heterozygote phenotype is more extreme than either homozygote
